raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The California State Assembly voted on a pandemic relief package providing $7.6 billion in relief to individuals, families, and business owners.",
    "The relief package aims to assist those suffering economic hardship from the COVID-19 Recession.",
    "Small businesses have been struggling under complex state mandates for nearly a year.",
    "The combination of additional grant funding and tax forgiveness will help small business owners keep their doors open.",
    "The Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) and Child Tax Credit are effective tools for promoting work and fighting poverty.",
    "Households receiving the California EITC for 2020 will receive additional one-time relief.",
    "$600 one-time payments will be distributed to households with incomes below $75,000 and Individual Tax Identification Numbers (ITINs).",
    "ITIN taxpayers who qualify for the California EITC will receive a total of $1,200.",
    "Grant payments for CalWORKS households are expected by mid-April.",
    "The pandemic relief package has increased grant funding for small businesses from $500 million to more than $2 billion.",
    "Small businesses impacted by the pandemic can apply for grants up to $25,000.",
    "New federal funds will provide stipends for state-subsidized child care providers serving approximately 400,000 children.",
    "The federal resources will extend care for children of essential workers through June of 2022.",
    "The agreement allocates $35 million for food banks and diapers.",
    "An additional $100 million in emergency financial aid will be made available for low-income community college students.",
    "$20 million is designated to reengage students who have left or are at risk of leaving community college due to the pandemic."
  ]
}
```
